queries.question: Provide a list of all guest rooms as well as a list of suites that have air conditioning.
queries.sql:
SELECT Guestrooms.room as room
FROM Guestrooms
UNION
SELECT Suites.suite_name as room
FROM Suites
WHERE Suites.amenities = "Air Conditioning"

queries.question: Show guest rooms and suites that have air conditioning.
queries.sql:
SELECT Guestrooms.room as room
FROM Guestrooms
WHERE Guestrooms.amenities = "Air Conditioning"
UNION
SELECT Suites.suite_name as room
FROM Suites
WHERE Suites.amenities = "Air Conditioning"

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show guest rooms and suites that have air conditioning.
